Description: Confidently go from work to play with the new Odyn. Featuring a gray-tone stainless steel case, the sports-focused timepiece makes use of sharp lines and monochromatic styling to make a statement on the wrist. A faceted 60-minute bezel, H-link bracelet, and 100m water resistance ensure all-purpose wear. On the dial, a textured gray display is presented, with applied indices in bright white alongside a 3 o'clock date window providing high legibility and daily utility. Featuring Citizen's Eco-Drive technology, sustainably powered by any light and never needs a battery.

Description: Experience the fusion of sporty style and everyday functionality with the Sport Automatic, the latest timepiece in our Automatics Collection featuring a high-performance movement. A 42mm silver-tone stainless steel case provides the foundation of the watch, with smartly integrated crown guards, a bold two-tone 60-minute bezel, and a silver-tone stainless steel bracelet adding to its sporty credentials. Underneath a sapphire crystal, the black dial makes a striking statement with a sunray finish paired with bold geometric appliques for an aesthetic that’s as legible as it is captivating. With a retro-cool day-date display at 3 o’clock and water resistance up to 100 meters, this timepiece offers charm and practicality for your daily adventures.

Description: The TSUYOSA Automatic brings ultramodern sports styling right to your wrist. Executed in a versatile 40mm footprint, the sophisticated design of the watch makes a strong impression via a silver-tone stainless steel case and a seamlessly integrated, matching bracelet. Underneath an anti-reflective sapphire crystal, the sporty timepiece makes use of a sunray black dial, with a 3 o’clock date window and contrasting silver-tone details adding to its classic aesthetic. Powered by an automatic movement and offering up to 50 meters of water resistance, the refined timepiece is a daily wearing choice ready for work, play, and everything in between.
